title: Untitled Wemmbu Texturepack
description: i like wemmbu so its a very wemmbuy
body:
![title in minecraft title font that says Untitled Wemmbu Texturepack and in smaller letters by FEARmedusa55](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c69acc0d8c068ef1da9990eb643861ba2abf817b.png)
## A description is required? Fine, I guess, but I'm going to a grammar checker.

YO SQUIDDO YOU WANT A TEXTUREPACK?

Btw, before I begin, I used properties that belong to others, so I will list them here.
(If you created any of these and wish for them to be removed, let me know on DC at FEARmedusa55.)
- songs: [PLAYFUL MASSACRE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SSkL-n8zZ2U&list=RDSSkL-n8zZ2U), [CHAOS CONSTRUCT](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=btAgNS3Zb_U&list=RDbtAgNS3Zb_U), and [PLAYING WITH FIRE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0B9gzAYCK50&list=RD0B9gzAYCK50) were made by [AZALI](https://www.youtube.com/@AZALI00013).
- song: [Wemmbu's Official Theme Song](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OaAb9bf3vb8&list=RDOaAb9bf3vb8) was made by [Nombra101](https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101).
- song: [2 Phones](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oiY_iKSpWLM&list=RDoiY_iKSpWLM) was made by [Kevin Gates](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCj2GTFekdV3EUsTVN8oaEqA).
- painting of [eggchan pointing in surprise](https://www.tiktok.com/@herpic.cian/video/7587010755518827797) by [Herpic](https://www.tiktok.com/@herpic.cian) on TikTok
- painting of [Wdhoapoml </3](https://www.tiktok.com/@lii_lova24/video/7587520420711075094) (it's in the comments) by [lil_lova24](https://www.tiktok.com/@lii_lova24) on TikTok
- painting of [why dis :wemmbuface: look so mad :crying:](https://x.com/mafufusan/status/1991639693138538525) by [mafufusan](https://x.com/mafufusan) on X
- painting of [Asianhalfsquat (the goat) and Eggchan](https://www.tiktok.com/@revhuwa/photo/7588854810993036552) by [revhuwa](https://www.tiktok.com/@revhuwa) on TikTok
- painting of [wifies do you have food?](https://www.tiktok.com/@satoukun09/photo/7573190094971014418?is_from_webapp=1) by [Satoukun09](https://www.tiktok.com/@satoukun09) on TikTok
- painting of [cat femboy wemmbu dancing](https://www.tiktok.com/@piskogriz_22820189/video/7580267817702903070) (it hurt to type that) by [1108._.wifies](https://www.tiktok.com/@1108._.wifies?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc) on TikTok
- used textures from [even better enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants) by [mythitorium](https://modrinth.com/user/mythitorium)


A texture pack that was made for the sole reason that I like unstable SMP and Wemmbu
Also, don't dog on me; this is my first time making a texture pack.

Custom recoloring for armor, weapons, and tools
![a image of a minecraft hotbar that shows custom tools and armor ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca7a8db661779f0af211141fd72aeab183111c9b.png)
![A image of a player wearing afore mentioned armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcb5f998782766bb0030d319f8f2c499852e219b.png)

(These images will 100% change, no doubt.)

custom paintings (that I do not own; please support the original creators)
![a picture of the afore mentioned paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c462946b33ae758969610ad5935c0ea320a7daf4_0.webp)


custom music disc textures (I do not own the music; please support the original creators)
![a picture of 5 custom music disc textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5bedb464f6c651d554c54e9441fbf50e8dbcf59.png)



If any fans of the Unstable SMP have any ideas, feel free to share at my DC (FEARmedusa55).
